# Be Nice Properties

> Be Nice Properties (BNP) is a family-run property company based in Douglasville, Georgia, west of Atlanta. We operate furnished co-living homes (private rooms in shared houses with all-inclusive rent and flexible terms up to 90 days), whole-home short-term rentals in the Atlanta area and Antigua, and long-term rental homes. Guests book directly with us at https://www.beniceproperties.com — no platform middleman.

Key facts:
- Co-living: private furnished rooms in shared homes west of Atlanta (Douglasville area). All-inclusive rent covers utilities, wifi, and furnishings. Lease terms are flexible, from about a week up to 90 days, with weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly payment schedules.
- Short-term rentals: whole-home stays in the Atlanta area and Antigua, booked by the night, including The Retreat at Douglasville, a themed date-night property.
- Long-term rentals: unfurnished and furnished homes for a year or more, inquiry-based.
- Booking is direct on our own site: real payment schedules shown before you commit, e-signed leases, and the people answering messages are the people who run the homes.
